name: autofix
description: CI autofix agent: diagnoses build/deploy failures and applies minimal, verified fixes.

preToolUse.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(cat | jq -r .tool_input.command 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in git\ commit*|git\ push*|git\ checkout*|git\ reset*|git\ rebase*|git\ merge*|git\ stash*) echo "BLOCKED: git operation not allowed — the workflow handles git."; exit 2 ;; esac'

postToolUse.command: bash -c 'FILE="$KIRO_TOOL_ARG_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.rs) cargo fmt -- "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */baileys-service/*.ts|*/baileys-service/*.tsx) npx eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; */android/*.kt) cd android && ./gradlew spotlessApply -PspotlessFiles="$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac'
